SocialHub.title: 소셜 미디어 허브
SocialHub.subtitle: 소셜 미디어 연결 및 게시물을 관리합니다.
SocialHub.connect_meta_desc: 페이지와 프로페셔널 계정을 연결하여 직접 게시합니다. Instagram 프로페셔널 계정이 Facebook 페이지에 연결되어 있는지 확인하십시오.
SocialHub.connect_tiktok_desc: TikTok 계정을 연결하여 동영상을 예약하고 직접 게시합니다.
SocialHub.beta_alert: Instagram 및 TikTok과의 직접 연동은 현재 개발 중이며 플랫폼 승인 대기 중입니다 (비공개 베타). 이 기능은 곧 공개될 예정입니다.

LandingPage.hero_description: 마음의 평화를 위한 알고리즘 지능. 규정 준수를 용이하게 하고 Rive AI 에코시스템이 운영을 예측하고 송장을 스캔하며 Food Cost를 추적하도록 하십시오.
LandingPage.features_card1_title: 규정 준수 도우미 및 시정 조치
LandingPage.features_card1_desc: AI가 온도 기록을 분석하고 이상 징후에 대한 제안을 제시하며, 팀의 검증을 거칩니다.
LandingPage.features_card3_desc: 주방 팀의 모국어에 맞게 인터페이스가 즉시 적응합니다.
LandingPage.philosophy_intro: 오늘날 레스토랑을 운영한다는 것은 종종 신뢰할 수 있는 도구 없이 예측 불가능한 폭풍을 헤쳐나가는 것을 의미합니다.
LandingPage.philosophy_vision: 단순한 도구 이상으로, Rive는 모든 결정을 최적화하기 위한 필수 나침반입니다.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar1_desc: Rive는 전문성을 대체하지 않습니다 — 데이터로 증폭시킵니다.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar2_desc: 누락된 모든 데이터 포인트에는 비용이 있습니다. Rive가 이를 가시화합니다.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar3_desc: 보정할수록 시스템이 더 많이 학습합니다. 이것은 당사의 인텔리전스가 아닌 귀하의 인텔리전스입니다.
LandingPage.hero_loss_hook: 데이터 없는 매일이 보이지 않는 낭비입니다.
LandingPage.calculator_subtitle: 신뢰할 수 있는 데이터 없이 과잉 생산의 비용을 추정합니다.
LandingPage.protocol_phase1_desc: 버튼 하나로, Rive가 귀하의 리듬을 학습하기 시작합니다.
LandingPage.features_card3_source_text: Clean the cold zone of the fridges
LandingPage.features_card3_target_text: Limpiar la zona fría de las neveras
LandingPage.features_title: 항해에 필요한 모든 도구가 한곳에 있습니다.
LandingPage.f1_desc: 흩어진 노트는 잊으십시오. 직원 인수인계, 장비 문제, 팀원 사건이 기록되고, 매핑되며, AI가 추적합니다.
LandingPage.f1_ex1: 장비 사고를 기록합니다 (예: "냉장고 2 누수, 수리 기사 호출").
LandingPage.f1_ex2: 저녁 팀에게 정확한 항해 지침을 전달합니다.
LandingPage.f2_desc: Rive가 온도 및 프로세스 이상을 감지하고, 규정 준수 위험을 피하기 위한 시정 항로를 설정합니다.
LandingPage.f2_ex1: 냉장고 8°C 도달: 시정 조치 제안 "고위험 식품 격리 또는 폐기".
LandingPage.f2_ex2: 튀김기 기름 점검을 위한 자동 알림.
LandingPage.f3_desc: 언어 장벽이 더 이상 존재하지 않습니다. 모든 구성원이 자신의 모국어로 앱과 메모에 접근합니다.
LandingPage.f3_ex1: 셰프는 스페인어로 작성하고, 설거지 담당자는 벵골어로 읽습니다.
LandingPage.f3_ex2: 레시피 카드를 모든 신규 직원이 즉시 이해합니다.
LandingPage.f3_ex3: 직원의 출신에 관계없이 안전 절차를 습득합니다.
LandingPage.integrations_banner: POS 시스템과 네이티브 연동: Toast, Square, SumUp, Stripe, Lightspeed, Zettle...
LandingPage.f4_desc: 수익 레이더가 POS에 연결되어 판매량과 비용을 실시간으로 교차 분석합니다. 자율적으로 마진을 극대화합니다.
LandingPage.f4_ex1: Toast, Square, SumUp, Zettle 또는 Lightspeed에서 매출을 자동으로 가져옵니다.
LandingPage.f4_ex2: 스마트 퍼포먼스 매트릭스로 "스타" 대 "록" 메뉴를 식별합니다.
LandingPage.f4_ex3: 호환되지 않는 시스템? Rive의 AI가 모든 CSV 내보내기를 네이티브로 파싱하고 가져옵니다.
LandingPage.f5_desc: 더 이상 송장을 수동으로 입력하지 마십시오. AI가 품목, 제품, 수량을 세밀하게 추출하여 순비용을 업데이트합니다.
LandingPage.f5_ex1: 배송 시 구겨진 공급업체 송장을 촬영합니다.
LandingPage.f5_ex2: 식재료의 세밀한 라인별 추출 및 가격 변동 알림.
LandingPage.f5_ex3: 레시피 Food Cost의 실시간 자동 업데이트.
LandingPage.f6_desc: 원클릭으로 생성된 요리 하이라이트의 매력적인 게시물로 신규 고객을 유치합니다.
LandingPage.f6_ex1: 완벽한 이모지와 함께 발렌타인데이 메뉴를 위한 매력적인 캡션을 생성합니다.
LandingPage.f6_ex2: 해외 고객을 유치하기 위해 게시물을 자동 번역합니다.
LandingPage.f6_ex3: 배달 플랫폼 (UberEats, Deliveroo)을 위한 매력적인 설명을 작성합니다.
LandingPage.f7_desc: Libro, Resy, Zenchef에서 모든 고객 예약을 동기화합니다. 실시간 업데이트를 위한 웹훅 및 자동 폴링.
LandingPage.f7_ex1: 수동 입력 없이 온라인 예약을 즉시 수신합니다.
LandingPage.f7_ex2: 도착 예정 고객, 취소, 노쇼를 하나의 중앙 뷰로 통합합니다.
LandingPage.f7_ex3: 고객 데이터를 교차 분석하여 서비스 볼륨을 예측합니다.
LandingPage.f8_desc: 소나 분석이 도착 예정 고객, 매출 흐름, 지도를 교차 분석하여 자동으로 프렙 항로를 생성합니다.
LandingPage.f8_ex1: 확정된 정확한 고객 수를 기반으로 각 메뉴의 배급량을 계산합니다.
LandingPage.f8_ex3: 돛을 올리기 전에 총 화물 비용을 추정합니다.
LandingPage.f6_mock_caption: Discover tonight's special menu! A perfectly seared bluefin tuna... ✨ Reservation in bio 👇
LandingPage.tier_essential_desc: 일상 운영을 체계화하기 위한 필수 기능.
LandingPage.tier_performance_desc: 마진과 Food Cost를 최적화하기 위한 수익성 레이더.
LandingPage.tier_intelligence_desc: 자동화된 예측, 보정된 프렙 리스트, 최대 98% 정확도.
LandingPage.f9_desc: 액체류의 정밀 추적. 케그 수율 관리, 유리 보증금 별도 추적, 마이크로 브루어리 생산 칸반 운영.
LandingPage.f9_ex1: 실제 Food Cost에서 병 및 케그 보증금을 즉시 분리합니다.
LandingPage.f9_ex2: POS 매출과 실물 재고 간의 정확한 서빙 손실(차이)을 추적합니다.
LandingPage.f9_ex3: 발효에서 케그 충전까지 맥주 배치를 특정 수율로 관리합니다.

Pricing.title: 명확한 요금, 실질적인 효과.
Pricing.subtitle: 무료로 시작하고, 준비되면 업그레이드하세요.
Pricing.tier_essential_desc: 일상 운영을 체계화하기 위한 필수 기능.
Pricing.tier_performance_desc: 마진과 Food Cost를 최적화하기 위한 수익성 레이더.
Pricing.tier_enterprise_desc: 전담 기술 지원이 포함된 다중 사이트 운영.
Pricing.tier_intelligence_desc: 자동화된 예측, 보정된 프렙 리스트, 최대 98% 정확도.
Pricing.waste_calculator_subtitle: 신뢰할 수 있는 데이터 없이 과잉 생산을 추정합니다.
Pricing.essential_avoids: 분실된 메모, 종이 체크리스트, 다국어 커뮤니케이션 오류
Pricing.performance_avoids: Food Cost 분석 없이 약 8% 마진 손실, 수동 송장 입력, 최적화되지 않은 메뉴
Pricing.intelligence_avoids: 약 15% 과잉 생산 = 주간 낭비, 감에 의존한 예측, 단절된 데이터
Pricing.enterprise_custom_desc: 통합 대시보드, 다중 사이트, 맞춤 배포 및 교육.
Pricing.features_title: 항해에 필요한 모든 도구가 한곳에 있습니다.

Auth.error_confirm: '이메일 확인' 설정이 Supabase에서 아직 활성화되어 있습니다. 이메일 검증 없이 테스트하려면 Authentication > Providers > Email에서 비활성화하십시오.

Dashboard.setup_menu_desc: Add your dishes to unlock the Performance Matrix.
Dashboard.setup_pos_desc: Synchronize your sales for real-time analysis.
Dashboard.setup_team_desc: Share access to the Logbook and connect your teams.
Dashboard.setup_completed: Initial deployment complete. All systems operational.

TrialModal.title: 100% 무료 체험
TrialModal.description_after: 넉넉한 할당량으로 모든 Rive AI 기능에 접근하십시오.
TrialModal.footer_note: 무료 크레딧이 소진된 후에만 결제가 시작됩니다.

Instagram.title: 📸 Instagram Generator
Instagram.subtitle: Generate a complete post with AI
Instagram.desc: Rive will generate a full Instagram post with caption, hashtags, and call-to-action, tailored to your dish's classification.
Instagram.quota_desc: You have generated your {count} free posts. Upgrade to Performance.

Logbook.title: The Captain's Log
Logbook.placeholder: Every service is a voyage. What happened today? The AI maps your narrative...
Logbook.quota_desc: You have analyzed your {count} free notes. Upgrade to Performance.
Logbook.scan_quota_desc: Quota reached ({count} scans). Upgrade to Enterprise.
Logbook.empty_state: No notes yet. Add your first observation.

MenuEditor.title: 🍽️ Menu Manager
MenuEditor.desc: Edit your menu here — changes are instantly reflected on your QR code and mini-site.

MenuEngineering.title: 🧭 Performance Matrix — Menu Performance
MenuEngineering.desc_full: Generate a detailed Profit Topography of your Menu Ecosystem crossing your prices, costs, and popularity to discover your Stars and Rocks.
MenuEngineering.desc_short: Automatic classification of your dishes by popularity and profitability.
MenuEngineering.quota_desc: You have generated your {count} free analyses. Upgrade to Performance.

CGU.title: Terms of Service — Rive
CGU.s1_p1: Rive is a software-as-a-service (SaaS) platform designed to **assist** restaurant owners, managers, and food-service professionals in their daily operations through AI-powered tools and data-driven insights. The service is accessible at **rivehub.com** and is intended for use by international gastronomic and fine-dining establishments.
CGU.s1_p2: Rive provides, among others, the following features:
CGU.s1_l1: **Digital logbook** — AI-powered service note logging, automatic classification, urgency detection, and corrective action suggestions
CGU.s1_l2: **Temperature monitoring** — Recording, trend analysis, and AI-generated corrective action recommendations
CGU.s1_l3: **Multilingual translation** — AI-assisted translation of service notes across 19 supported languages
CGU.s1_l4: **Food cost analysis** — Automated margin calculation per dish, ingredient price tracking, and profitability alerts
CGU.s1_l5: **Menu engineering** — BCG-matrix classification of menu items (Star, Anchor, Drift, Rock) with AI-generated strategic recommendations
CGU.s1_l6: **Receipt and invoice digitization** — Optical character recognition (OCR) powered by AI vision models to extract supplier, line-item, and pricing data from photographs of invoices and receipts
CGU.s1_l7: **AI social media content generation** — Draft posts with captions, hashtags, and formatting for Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok, generated from dish descriptions and photographs
CGU.s1_l8: **Smart prep lists** — AI-generated preparation lists based on reservation data, historical sales, menu engineering classification, and recipe ingredients
CGU.s1_l9: **Reservation integration** — Real-time synchronization with third-party reservation platforms (currently Libro, Resy, and Zenchef, with additional platforms planned)
CGU.s1_l10: **Variance and inventory tracking** — Cross-referencing of POS theoretical sales against actual physical inventory, spoilage and loss declaration, and deposit tracking (kegs, crates, bottles)
CGU.s1_l11: **Brewery production tracking** — Batch management from fermentation through kegging and canning or bottling stages
CGU.s1_l12: **Daily intelligence scoring** — A composite score reflecting the depth and quality of data connected to the system, with personalized recommendations for improvement
CGU.s1_p3: The specific features available to each user depend on their subscription tier. Rive reserves the right to add, modify, or discontinue features at any time.
CGU.s2_p1: **2.1.** To access the Rive service, the user must create an account using a valid email address. Account creation is completed through Rive's authentication system, powered by Supabase Auth. By registering, the user represents that the email address provided is accurate and belongs to them.
CGU.s2_p2: **2.2.** The user is solely responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their login credentials, including their email address and password. The user agrees to notify Rive immediately at **dock@rivehub.com** of any unauthorized use of their account or any other breach of security. Rive shall not be liable for any loss or damage arising from the user's failure to safeguard their credentials.
CGU.s2_p3: **2.3.** Rive offers a **free version** that does not require a credit card and has no time-limited trial period. The free tier is subject to **usage quotas** that limit the number of AI-powered operations (such as logbook analyses, receipt scans, social media content generations, and prep list generations) available per billing period. Usage beyond these quotas requires a paid subscription. Quota limits for each tier are displayed in the user's account settings and on the pricing page.
CGU.s2_p4: **2.4.** The user must be at least **18 years of age** or the age of majority in their jurisdiction, whichever is greater, to create an account and use the service. By registering, the user represents and warrants that they meet this requirement.
CGU.s2_s1_p1: The user agrees not to use the Rive service for any purpose that is unlawful or prohibited by these Terms. Without limitation, the user shall not:
CGU.s2_s1_l1: Use the service for any **unlawful, fraudulent, or deceptive** purpose
CGU.s2_s1_l2: Generate, publish, or distribute **misleading food safety content**, false health claims, or fraudulent regulatory compliance documentation using any Rive feature
CGU.s2_s1_l3: **Share account credentials** with third parties or allow multiple individuals to access the service through a single account (team access must be managed through Rive's built-in team invitation system)
CGU.s2_s1_l4: **Reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble** any portion of the Rive service, its underlying algorithms, or AI integrations
CGU.s2_s1_l5: **Scrape, crawl, or harvest** data from the Rive service by automated means, or use any robot, spider, or similar device to access the service
CGU.s2_s1_l6: **Resell, sublicense, or redistribute** access to the Rive service or any output generated by the service to third parties as a standalone product or competing service
CGU.s2_s1_l7: Upload, transmit, or distribute any content that is **defamatory, obscene, threatening, abusive, or otherwise objectionable**, or that infringes the intellectual property rights of any third party
CGU.s3_title: 3. Specific Clause — Artificial Intelligence and Liability
CGU.s3_s1_p1: The Rive service integrates artificial intelligence technologies based on **large language models (LLMs)** provided by Anthropic (Claude). These technologies are used to:
CGU.s3_l1: Analyze, classify, and summarize service notes in the digital logbook
CGU.s3_l2: Suggest corrective actions when operational abnormalities or temperature deviations are detected
CGU.s3_l3: Translate service content between supported languages
CGU.s3_l4: Extract structured data from receipt and invoice images using vision models
CGU.s3_l5: Generate draft social media content (captions, hashtags, and formatting) for Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok
CGU.s3_l6: Analyze food cost data and generate profitability alerts
CGU.s3_l7: Produce menu engineering classifications and strategic recommendations
CGU.s3_l8: Generate smart preparation lists based on reservation forecasts and historical data
CGU.s3_l9: Calculate and present daily intelligence scores with actionable improvement suggestions
CGU.s3_s2_p1: Suggestions, analyses, recommendations, and content generated by the AI integrated into Rive are provided **for informational and indicative purposes only**. The user acknowledges and expressly accepts that:
CGU.s3_s2_l1: **AI-generated outputs do not constitute professional, medical, legal, or food safety advice.** They are computational predictions and should not be treated as expert opinions in any professional discipline, including but not limited to food science, nutrition, public health, regulatory compliance, accounting, or legal matters.
CGU.s3_s2_l2: **AI-generated outputs are not a substitute for the judgment of qualified professionals.** Users must consult accredited health inspectors, food safety consultants, licensed accountants, legal advisors, or other competent experts as appropriate for their specific circumstances.
CGU.s3_s2_l3: **AI may produce inaccurate, incomplete, misleading, or inappropriate results.** Due to the inherent probabilistic nature of the language models used, outputs may contain factual errors, omissions, or contextually inappropriate suggestions. Results may vary from one execution to another for the same input.
CGU.s3_s2_l4: **Final responsibility for any operational decision** — including but not limited to corrective actions, food safety measures, health compliance decisions, menu changes, staffing decisions, purchasing decisions, internal communications, and external publications — **rests exclusively with the user** and the qualified personnel of the establishment.
CGU.s3_s2_l5: **Rive does not guarantee regulatory compliance** of the user's establishment in any jurisdiction. The service is designed to *facilitate* and *assist* compliance management, but it does not replace mandatory regulatory processes, inspections, certifications, or professional assessments required by applicable law.
CGU.s3_s3_p1: The user acknowledges that they have a duty of care when using AI-generated outputs and agrees to:
CGU.s3_s3_l1: **Verify and validate** any AI-generated suggestion, analysis, or content before applying it in operations, publishing it externally, or relying upon it for any decision
CGU.s3_s3_l2: **Not rely exclusively** on AI-generated suggestions for decisions impacting food safety, public health, financial reporting, or regulatory compliance
CGU.s3_s3_l3: **Maintain all required regulatory skills, certifications, and training** for personnel, independent of and in addition to using the Rive service
CGU.s3_s3_l4: **Report** any clearly inappropriate, potentially dangerous, or manifestly incorrect AI-generated output to the Rive team at **dock@rivehub.com** so that improvements can be made
CGU.s3_s4_p1: The AI models integrated into Rive are **non-deterministic** by nature. This means that submitting the same input at different times may produce different outputs. Rive does not guarantee the consistency, reproducibility, or stability of AI-generated results across sessions, model versions, or time periods. Users should not assume that a previously generated output will be replicated in subsequent requests.
CGU.s3_s5_p1: Rive continuously works to improve the accuracy, relevance, and reliability of its AI-powered features. Updates to AI models, prompting strategies, and processing pipelines may be deployed without prior notice. These improvements may alter the behavior, formatting, or content of AI-generated outputs. Rive makes no guarantee that improvements will not temporarily affect the quality or consistency of results.
CGU.s3_s6_p1: AI-generated social media content (including posts for Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok) is provided as a **draft only**. The user acknowledges and agrees that:
CGU.s3_s6_l1: All AI-generated social media content must be **reviewed, edited, and approved** by the user before publication
CGU.s3_s6_l2: The user is solely responsible for ensuring that published content complies with all **applicable social media platform terms of service** and community guidelines
CGU.s3_s6_l3: The user must independently verify that published content does not infringe any **third-party intellectual property rights**, including trademarks, copyrights, and rights of publicity
CGU.s3_s6_l4: The user is solely responsible for ensuring that any published claims regarding **allergens, dietary restrictions, nutritional information, or health benefits** comply with applicable food labelling and advertising regulations in their jurisdiction
CGU.s3_s6_l5: Rive shall not be liable for any consequences arising from the publication of AI-generated social media content, whether modified or unmodified by the user
CGU.s3_s7_p1: Rive reserves the right to **change, replace, or supplement** the underlying AI models, providers, or technologies used in the service at any time and without prior notice. Such changes may include switching between different model versions, providers, or architectures. Rive does not guarantee that output quality, style, or consistency will remain unchanged following such modifications.
CGU.s4_s1_p1: Rive collects and processes personal data in accordance with **Canada's Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA)** and, where applicable, **Quebec's Act Respecting the Protection of Personal Information in the Private Sector (Law 25)**. For users located in the European Economic Area (EEA), the United Kingdom, or Switzerland, Rive also complies with the **General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)** and applicable local data protection legislation. For users in other jurisdictions, Rive complies with applicable local data protection laws.
CGU.s4_s2_p1: Data entered by the user — including service notes, temperature records, recipes, invoices, menu items, reservation data, and other operational information — is securely stored on cloud infrastructure provided by **Supabase** (PostgreSQL database with row-level security). Supabase's infrastructure is hosted in SOC 2 Type II compliant data centers.
CGU.s4_s3_p1: Certain user data is transmitted to **Anthropic** via their API for AI processing (analysis, extraction, generation, and translation). Rive confirms that, as of the date of these Terms, **Anthropic does not use customer data submitted through its API to train its models**. Rive commits to minimizing the personal data transmitted to AI providers and to transmitting only the data strictly necessary for the requested operation. For further details, users are encouraged to review Anthropic's privacy policy at **https://www.anthropic.com/privacy**.
CGU.s4_s4_p1: The user **retains full ownership** of all data they enter into the Rive service, including but not limited to service notes, recipes, menu content, images, financial data, and team information. Rive does not claim any ownership rights over user-submitted data.
CGU.s4_s5_p1: Depending on applicable law, users may exercise the following rights with respect to their personal data:
CGU.s4_s5_l1: **Right of access** — Obtain confirmation of whether personal data is being processed and request a copy of such data
CGU.s4_s5_l2: **Right to rectification** — Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete personal data
CGU.s4_s5_l3: **Right to erasure** — Request deletion of personal data, subject to legal retention obligations
CGU.s4_s5_l4: **Right to data portability** — Receive personal data in a structured, commonly used, machine-readable format and transmit it to another controller
CGU.s4_s5_l5: **Right to restriction of processing** — Request that processing be limited in certain circumstances
CGU.s4_s5_l6: **Right to object** — Object to processing of personal data based on legitimate interests or for direct marketing purposes
CGU.s4_s5_l7: **Right to withdraw consent** — Where processing is based on consent, withdraw that consent at any time without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing
CGU.s4_s5_p2: To exercise any of these rights, please contact Rive at **dock@rivehub.com**. Rive will respond to all valid requests within **30 calendar days**. For EEA/UK/Swiss users, the legal bases for processing personal data under the GDPR include: (a) performance of the contract (provision of the service), (b) legitimate interests (service improvement, security, and fraud prevention), and (c) consent (where specifically obtained). EEA/UK/Swiss users also have the right to lodge a complaint with their local data protection authority.
CGU.s4_s6_p1: Rive uses the following sub-processors in the delivery of its service:
CGU.s4_s6_l1: **Supabase** — Database hosting, authentication, and file storage
CGU.s4_s6_l2: **Anthropic** — AI model inference (text analysis, content generation, OCR extraction, translation)
CGU.s4_s6_l5: **Meta (Instagram/Facebook)** — Social media content publishing via OAuth integration (only when activated by the user)
CGU.s4_s6_l6: **TikTok** — Social media content publishing via OAuth integration (only when activated by the user)
CGU.s4_s6_p2: Rive maintains appropriate data processing agreements with each sub-processor and will update this list as sub-processors are added or changed.
CGU.s4_s7_p1: User data may be transferred to and processed in countries outside the user's country of residence. For transfers from the EEA/UK/Switzerland to **Canada**, Rive relies on the European Commission's adequacy decision recognizing Canada as providing an adequate level of data protection. For transfers to the **United States** (where certain sub-processors operate), Rive relies on Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission, or other legally recognized transfer mechanisms as applicable.
CGU.s4_s8_p1: Rive retains user data for as long as the user's account remains active and the service is in use. Upon account cancellation or termination:
CGU.s4_s8_l1: The user has **30 calendar days** to export their data through the service's export functionality
CGU.s4_s8_l2: After 30 days, Rive will initiate deletion of the user's personal data and operational data
CGU.s4_s8_l3: Complete deletion (hard delete) will be performed within **90 calendar days** of account cancellation, subject to any legal retention obligations
CGU.s4_s8_l4: **Anonymized and aggregated data** (which cannot be used to identify any individual or establishment) may be retained indefinitely for statistical analysis and service improvement purposes
CGU.s4_s9_p1: Rive uses **essential cookies** that are strictly necessary for the operation of the service (such as authentication session tokens). Non-essential cookies (such as analytics or marketing cookies) are only placed with the user's explicit consent. For more information, please refer to our Cookie Policy, accessible via the service interface.
CGU.s5_s1_p1: The Rive service is provided **"as-is" and "as-available"** without warranties of any kind, whether express, implied, or statutory, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, accuracy, and non-infringement. Rive does not warrant that the service will be error-free, uninterrupted, secure, or free of viruses or other harmful components.
CGU.s5_s2_p1: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, in no event shall Rive, its officers, directors, employees, agents, or service providers be liable for any **indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages** resulting from or related to the use of or inability to use the service, including but not limited to:
CGU.s5_s2_l1: **Lost profits** or anticipated revenue, whether direct or indirect
CGU.s5_s2_l2: **Loss of data**, including data corruption or inability to access data
CGU.s5_s2_l4: Financial losses resulting from inaccurate AI-generated data, analyses, or recommendations
CGU.s5_s2_l5: Regulatory sanctions, fines, or penalties resulting from reliance on service suggestions
CGU.s5_s2_l6: Food waste, spoilage, or operational losses related to AI-generated corrective actions or prep list recommendations
CGU.s5_s3_p1: Rive's total aggregate liability to the user for all claims arising out of or relating to these Terms or the use of the service shall not exceed the **total amount of subscription fees actually paid by the user to Rive during the 12 months immediately preceding the event giving rise to the claim**. For users on the free tier, Rive's total liability shall not exceed **fifty Canadian dollars (CAD $50)**.
CGU.s5_s4_p1: Rive shall not be liable for any failure or delay in performing its obligations under these Terms if such failure or delay results from events beyond Rive's reasonable control, including but not limited to:
CGU.s5_s4_l1: Natural disasters, epidemics, pandemics, or acts of God
CGU.s5_s4_l2: Cyberattacks, including distributed denial-of-service attacks, ransomware, or data breaches affecting Rive's infrastructure or its sub-processors
CGU.s5_s4_l3: Government actions, regulations, embargoes, sanctions, or court orders
CGU.s5_s4_l4: Failures, outages, or service degradation by third-party providers, including Anthropic, Supabase, Vercel, and Stripe
CGU.s5_s4_l5: Power failures, telecommunications failures, or internet service disruptions
CGU.s5_s5_p1: Rive does not guarantee any specific level of uptime or availability unless a separate Service Level Agreement (SLA) has been executed with the user under an **Enterprise** subscription. Rive will use commercially reasonable efforts to maintain service availability and will endeavour to provide advance notice of planned maintenance windows. Emergency maintenance may be performed without prior notice when necessary to protect the security or integrity of the service.
CGU.s5_s6_p1: The user agrees to **indemnify, defend, and hold harmless** Rive and its officers, directors, employees, and agents from and against any and all claims, liabilities, damages, losses, costs, and expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising out of or related to:
CGU.s5_s6_l1: The user's **misuse** of the Rive service
CGU.s5_s6_l2: The user's **violation** of these Terms of Service or any applicable law
CGU.s5_s6_l3: The user's **publication or distribution** of AI-generated content without adequate review, including social media posts, public-facing communications, and regulatory documentation
CGU.s5_s6_l4: Any **third-party claims** arising from the user's use of the service, including claims related to food safety, intellectual property infringement, defamation, or privacy violations
CGU.s6_s1_p1: The Rive service — including its source code, algorithms, user interface designs, visual elements, branding, documentation, and all related intellectual property — is owned by Rive and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws, including copyright, trademark, and trade secret law. Nothing in these Terms grants the user any right, title, or interest in the Rive service beyond the limited right to use it in accordance with these Terms.
CGU.s6_s2_p1: The user **retains all rights** to the content they enter into the service, including but not limited to service notes, menus, recipes, images, financial data, team communications, and all other user-submitted materials.
CGU.s6_s3_p1: Content generated by the AI at the user's request — including social media posts, logbook summaries, corrective action suggestions, translations, prep lists, and analytical reports — is made available to the user for their **commercial use without restriction by Rive**. Rive does not claim any ownership of AI-generated content produced for the user. However, the user acknowledges that:
CGU.s6_s3_l1: Rive makes **no representation regarding the copyrightability** or intellectual property status of AI-generated content under any jurisdiction's laws
CGU.s6_s3_l2: The user is solely responsible for understanding and addressing the **legal implications** of using AI-generated content in their jurisdiction, including any requirements for disclosure of AI involvement in content creation
CGU.s6_s4_p1: By submitting content to the Rive service, the user grants Rive a **limited, non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free license** to use, process, store, display, and transmit such content solely for the purpose of operating and providing the service. This license includes the right to transmit content to sub-processors (such as Anthropic for AI analysis) as necessary for service operation. This license **terminates automatically** upon deletion of the content by the user or upon account termination and completion of the data retention period described in Section 4.8.
CGU.s6_s5_p1: If you believe that content available through the Rive service infringes your copyright or other intellectual property rights, please contact us at **dock@rivehub.com** with the following information:
CGU.s6_s5_l1: A description of the copyrighted work or intellectual property you claim has been infringed
CGU.s6_s5_l2: The location within the Rive service where the allegedly infringing material is found
CGU.s6_s5_l3: Your contact information, including name, address, telephone number, and email address
CGU.s6_s5_l4: A statement made in good faith that the use of the material is not authorized by the rights holder, its agent, or the law
CGU.s7_p1: **7.1.** The user may cancel their subscription and close their account at any time through their account settings within the Rive dashboard. Cancellation of a paid subscription takes effect at the end of the current billing period, and the user retains access to paid features until that date.
CGU.s7_p2: **7.2.** Upon termination, the user will have **30 calendar days** to export their data using the service's built-in export functionality. After this period, data will be processed in accordance with the retention schedule described in Section 4.8.
CGU.s7_p3: **7.3.** Rive reserves the right to **suspend or terminate** a user's access to the service, with or without notice, in the event of a violation of these Terms, fraudulent activity, abuse of AI features, or any conduct that Rive reasonably determines to be harmful to the service, other users, or third parties. In cases of material violation, suspension may be immediate.
CGU.s7_s1_p1: Subscription fees are **non-refundable** except where required by applicable consumer protection law. Upon cancellation, the user retains access to paid features until the end of the current billing period. No prorated refunds are issued for partial billing periods.
CGU.s7_s1_p2: In the event of an **extended service failure** attributable solely to Rive (defined as continuous unavailability exceeding 72 hours, excluding force majeure events), affected paid subscribers may request a prorated credit or refund for the period of unavailability by contacting **dock@rivehub.com**.
CGU.s8_p1: **8.1.** Rive reserves the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. Users will be notified of any material modification by email to their registered address and/or through an in-app notification within the Rive dashboard. The updated Terms will indicate the new effective date and version number.
CGU.s8_p2: **8.2.** Continued use of the service after notification of a modification constitutes **acceptance** of the updated Terms. If the user does not agree to the modified Terms, they must discontinue use of the service and close their account before the changes take effect.
CGU.s8_p3: **8.3. Severability.** If any provision of these Terms is held to be invalid, illegal, or unenforceable by a court of competent jurisdiction, such provision shall be modified to the minimum extent necessary to make it valid and enforceable, or if modification is not possible, severed from these Terms. The remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.
CGU.s8_p4: **8.4. Entire Agreement.** These Terms of Service, together with the Privacy Policy and any applicable subscription agreement, constitute the entire agreement between the user and Rive with respect to the use of the service and supersede all prior or contemporaneous communications, representations, or agreements, whether oral or written.
CGU.s8_p5: **8.5. Language Precedence.** These Terms are available in English and French. In the event of any conflict or inconsistency between the English and French versions, the **English version shall prevail**.
CGU.s9_p1: **9.1.** These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the **laws of the Province of Quebec** and the federal laws of Canada applicable therein, without regard to conflict-of-law principles.
CGU.s9_p2: **9.2. Informal Resolution.** Before initiating any formal legal proceedings, the parties agree to attempt to resolve any dispute arising out of or relating to these Terms through **good-faith negotiation** for a minimum period of **30 calendar days**. Dispute notifications should be sent to **dock@rivehub.com**.
CGU.s9_p3: **9.3.** Any dispute that cannot be resolved through informal negotiation shall be submitted to the **exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of the Province of Quebec**, District of Montreal. This choice of jurisdiction is subject to any **mandatory consumer protection laws** of the user's country of residence that cannot be waived by contract, which may entitle the user to bring proceedings in their local courts.
CGU.s9_p4: **9.4.** For users residing in the **European Union**, you may also seek resolution through the European Commission's Online Dispute Resolution (ODR) platform, accessible at **https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr**. This reference is provided for informational purposes and does not constitute a commitment by Rive to participate in any specific ODR procedure.
CGU.s10_p1: **10.1.** Paid subscriptions are available on a **monthly or annual recurring basis**. The subscription tiers — Free, Essential, Performance, Intelligence, and Enterprise — each provide access to different features and usage quotas as described on the Rive pricing page. Annual subscriptions are billed upfront for the full year at a discounted rate.
CGU.s10_p2: **10.2.** All payment processing is handled by **Stripe**. Rive does not directly store credit card numbers or sensitive payment credentials. Applicable taxes (including GST, QST, VAT, and other sales or value-added taxes) will be calculated and added to the subscription price **based on the user's billing location**, in accordance with applicable tax laws.
CGU.s10_p3: **10.3.** Subscriptions **automatically renew** at the end of each billing period (monthly or annually) unless the user cancels before the renewal date. The user will be charged the then-current subscription rate at each renewal.
CGU.s10_p4: **10.4. Failed Payments.** In the event of a failed payment, Rive will provide a **7-calendar-day grace period** during which the user retains full access while payment is retried. If payment cannot be collected after the grace period, the user's account will be **suspended** (downgraded to free-tier access). User data will be preserved for **30 calendar days** following suspension to allow the user to resolve the payment issue or export their data. After 30 days, the account may be subject to the data retention and deletion procedures described in Section 4.8.
CGU.s10_p5: **10.5. Price Changes.** Rive reserves the right to change subscription prices. Any price increase will be communicated to affected users with at least **30 calendar days' prior notice** via email. Price changes take effect at the start of the user's **next billing period** following the notice period. If the user does not agree to the new pricing, they may cancel their subscription before the new price takes effect.
CGU.contact_p1: For any questions, concerns, or requests regarding these Terms of Service, your account, your data, or any aspect of the Rive service, please contact us at **dock@rivehub.com**.

Meta.home_title: Rive — AI 기반 레스토랑 운영 플랫폼
Meta.home_description: 규정 준수, AI 로그북, Food Cost 분석, 19개 언어 번역, OCR 송장 스캐너, 메뉴 엔지니어링. 무료 버전 사용 가능.
Meta.pricing_description: 월 $59부터 시작하는 Rive 구독. AI 로그북, 규정 준수, Food Cost, 19개 언어 번역. 무료 버전 사용 가능, 신용카드 불필요.
Meta.cgu_description: 서비스 이용약관, AI 정책 및 데이터 개인정보 보호 서약을 확인하십시오.

Settings.title: 설정
Settings.subtitle: 환경설정, 모듈 및 팀을 관리합니다
Settings.placeholder_social_context: 예: 럭셔리한 톤, 파리지앵 분위기로 영어 작성, 항상 🍷 이모지와 #GastroLife 해시태그 사용
Settings.desc_social_context: 이 지침은 AI가 브랜드 보이스로 Instagram 게시물을 생성하는 데 사용됩니다.
Settings.team_desc: 다른 사람을 초대하여 레스토랑을 공동 관리합니다. 각 구성원은 초대 링크를 받습니다.
Settings.module_logbook_desc: AI 메모, 자동 분류, 긴급 사항
Settings.module_menu_editor_desc: 메뉴 CRUD, 공개 미니 사이트, QR Code
Settings.module_instagram_desc: 캡션과 해시태그가 포함된 메뉴 AI 게시물
Settings.module_smart_prep_desc: 매출 및 예약 기반 AI 프렙 리스트
Settings.integrations_desc: 예약 플랫폼 (Libro, Resy 등)을 연결하여 스마트 프렙 리스트 (AI 예측)를 활성화하십시오.
Settings.webhook_desc: 이 링크를 복사하여 예약 소프트웨어의 "Webhooks" 설정에 붙여넣으십시오.
Settings.webhook_waiting: 예측 활성화를 위한 첫 번째 예약을 기다리고 있습니다...
Settings.trial_desc: 현재 무료 체험 또는 수동 시스템을 사용 중입니다. 자동 결제가 설정되어 있지 않습니다.
Settings.free_desc: Rive의 무료 버전을 사용 중입니다. 모든 기능을 잠금 해제하려면 유료 플랜으로 업그레이드하세요.
Settings.module_deposits_desc: Food Cost와 별도로 케그 및 병 보증금을 추적합니다.
Settings.module_variance_desc: POS 예상치와 실물 재고 간의 불일치를 발견합니다.

SettingsIntegrations.title: POS 연결
SettingsIntegrations.subtitle: 실시간 동기화 & 데이터 가져오기
SettingsIntegrations.stripe_desc: Stripe Checkout 거래 및 결제에서 매출 볼륨을 동기화합니다.
SettingsIntegrations.square_desc: Square POS를 연결하여 주간 매출을 자동으로 가져옵니다.
SettingsIntegrations.toast_desc: Toast 시스템 (M2M API)을 연결하여 주간 티켓을 가져옵니다.

SettingsReservations.title: 예약 연동
SettingsReservations.subtitle: 네이티브 플랫폼 연결 (Libro, Resy, Zenchef)
SettingsReservations.api_key_prompt: {name} API 키를 입력하십시오. {name} 계정의 개발자 설정에서 찾을 수 있습니다.
SettingsReservations.auto_sync_desc: 자동 기록 동기화 및 양방향 작업.
SettingsReservations.resy_desc: 세계 최고의 예약 플랫폼 중 하나.

Success.title: 결제 완료
Success.subtitle: 신뢰에 감사드립니다. 구독이 활성화되었습니다.
Success.description: 새 모듈이 잠금 해제되어 사용할 준비가 되었습니다. 내비게이션 바에서 찾을 수 있습니다.
Success.login_needed: Please log in to accept the invitation.
Success.login_prompt: Log in or create an account, then come back to this link.
Success.error_network: Network error. Please try again later.

Invite.success_access: 이제 레스토랑 대시보드에 접근할 수 있습니다.
Invite.login_prompt: 로그인하거나 계정을 생성한 후 이 링크로 돌아오십시오.

WasteCalculator.title: 불확실성의 비용은 얼마입니까?
WasteCalculator.subtitle: 직접 숫자를 입력하여 식재료 낭비를 추정해 보세요
WasteCalculator.potential_reduction: 데이터 기반 수요 예측 관리로 이 손실을 연간 <value>{val}</value> 절감할 수 있습니다
WasteCalculator.disclaimer: 데이터 기반 수요 예측 관리 연구(WRAP, NRA)에 부합하는 {percent}% 폐기물 감소를 기준으로 한 추정치입니다. 실제 결과는 운영 환경에 따라 다를 수 있습니다.

LandingMockups.alert_text: Seafood cost exceeded the 30% threshold this week. Review your Salmon and Cod invoices.

Intelligence.title: My Intelligence
Intelligence.subtitle: Your system learns from every data point you connect and every feedback you give.
Intelligence.milestone_predictive_desc: POS plugged in — item-level predictions unlocked.
Intelligence.milestone_calibrated_desc: 7+ days of feedback — the system adapts to your reality.
Intelligence.hint_operational: Add your recipes to reach Predictive
Intelligence.hint_predictive: Give daily feedback to reach Calibrated

Reservations.title: Reservations
Reservations.subtitle: Libro · Resy · Zenchef — Real-time feed
Reservations.empty_no_platform_desc: Connect Libro, Resy, or Zenchef to receive your reservations automatically.
Reservations.confirm_delete_provider: Delete this connection? Associated reservations will be kept.
Reservations.modal_description: Select your reservation software. Rive will generate a unique Webhook link that you will need to paste in your platform's settings.

FoodCostAlerts.title: Rive AI: Profitability Alerts
FoodCostAlerts.empty_healthy_margins: Your margins are healthy! The AI detected no cost spikes on your recipes.

Deposits.empty_description: Deposits will appear here automatically when you scan an invoice containing deposit lines (kegs, crates, etc.).
Deposits.inventory_subtitle: Deposits extracted from your scanned invoices
Deposits.action_required_desc_after: in pending deposits. Return them to recover credit on your next order.
Deposits.ocr_description: Rive automatically extracts "Deposit" or "Consigne" lines from your scanned invoices to isolate this amount from your true Food Cost / Pour Cost indicator.

Production.empty_description: Start by creating a brewing recipe in the recipe editor, then launch your first production here.
Production.title: Batch Tracking

Variance.empty_description: Variance data will appear automatically after your first deposits and POS sales. Rive will cross-reference your theoretical sales with your actual inventory.

InvoiceScanner.title: New Invoice Scan
InvoiceScanner.subtitle: Drag a photo of an invoice. AI will automatically update your ingredient prices.
InvoiceScanner.dropzone_title: Click or Drag a file here
InvoiceScanner.dropzone_formats: Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, WEBP, PDF.
InvoiceScanner.dropzone_tip: Tip: On mobile, you can take a photo directly.
InvoiceScanner.ready_desc: We will extract the supplier, total, and map each product line to your local inventory.
InvoiceScanner.status_wait: Please wait (this may take up to 15s)
InvoiceScanner.error_unsupported_format: Unsupported format. Please upload an image or a short PDF.
InvoiceScanner.error_scan_failed: Error during scan (the file may be too large)
InvoiceScanner.error_analysis_generic: An error occurred during the analysis.

SmartPrep.title: Smart Prep List
SmartPrep.subtitle: Your system learns from your reservations, sales, and feedback
SmartPrep.empty_no_reservations: No reservations found for this date
SmartPrep.empty_connect_platforms: Connect your reservation platforms to activate predictions.
SmartPrep.ingredients_unlock_hint: Add your recipes in the Food Cost module to unlock Level 3.
SmartPrep.feedback_already_submitted: Feedback already submitted for this prep list
SmartPrep.feedback_adjustments_integrated: Adjustments have been integrated into future predictions.
SmartPrep.feedback_desc: Adjust actual portions for each item. Only modified items will affect future predictions.
SmartPrep.level_1_hint: Connect your POS to reach Level 2
SmartPrep.level_2_hint: Add your recipes to reach Level 3
